sections.paragraph:
for יְבוּל from the root יָבַל-

(1) rain, showers (see the root No. 1), hence the month of showers, the eighth of the Jewish months, from the new moon of November, to that of December, 1Ki 6:38.

(2) produce, i.q. תְּבוּאָה Job 40:20 with the addition of עֵץ the stock of a tree, the trunk, as in Chaldee. Isa 44:19.
